news.title: Govt eases China-linked FDI curbs under Press Note 3: What it means
news.india_relevance: This marks a significant shift in India's investment policy toward its largest neighbor after years of strict scrutiny.
news.why_it_matters: Relaxing Press Note 3 could unlock stalled manufacturing investments and signal a pragmatic reset in Indo-China economic relations.

news.title: Middle East Crisis: LPG, LNG supplies passing through Strait of Hormuz at risk - Why Iran conflict could hit Indian kitchens? EXPLAINED
news.india_relevance: India relies heavily on the Strait of Hormuz for its energy imports, directly affecting household fuel costs.
news.why_it_matters: Disruptions in this chokepoint threaten India's energy security and could trigger a surge in domestic inflation and fiscal subsidies.

news.title: Is India’s poverty rate 5% or 24%?
news.india_relevance: The debate over poverty metrics fundamentally shapes India's welfare policy and resource allocation.
news.why_it_matters: Conflicting data on poverty affects how the government targets subsidies and measures the success of its economic programs.

news.title: Maharashtra Govt farm loan waivers may lift rural NPAs, banks have buffers to absorb impact: Analysts
news.india_relevance: Farm loan waivers in a major state like Maharashtra impact the credit culture and balance sheets of Indian banks.
news.why_it_matters: While banks have buffers, repeated waivers can lead to moral hazard and long-term deterioration in rural credit discipline.

news.title: India's exports of active pharma ingredients at Rs 41,500 cr surpassed imports in FY25
news.india_relevance: This indicates a structural milestone in India's quest for 'Atmanirbharta' in the critical pharmaceutical sector.
news.why_it_matters: Becoming a net exporter of APIs reduces dependence on China and strengthens India's position as the 'pharmacy of the world.'

news.title: Hybrid super-credits could distort India’s CAFE-III emission targets, warns ex-NITI Aayog official
news.india_relevance: The policy debate over hybrid vs. electric vehicles is central to India's automotive transition and climate goals.
news.why_it_matters: Regulatory loopholes like super-credits could allow manufacturers to meet targets without achieving real-world emission reductions.

news.title: 16th Finance Commission is wrong — Panchayats are constitutional governments, not ‘local bodies’
news.india_relevance: This challenges the fiscal architecture of how funds are distributed between the Centre and rural local governments.
news.why_it_matters: Reclassifying panchayats could lead to greater financial autonomy and more effective decentralization of governance in India.

news.title: From GST gains to crude pain: FMCG firms shift polymer sourcing, weigh shrinkflation and price increases
news.india_relevance: FMCG companies are the primary indicator of Indian consumer demand and inflationary pressures.
news.why_it_matters: Rising input costs for packaging are forcing firms toward 'shrinkflation,' which directly impacts the purchasing power of Indian households.

news.title: Is grey market premium becoming a valuation trap for retail investors?
news.india_relevance: The surge in Indian IPOs has led to a speculative grey market that heavily influences retail participation.
news.why_it_matters: Understanding how GMP can be manipulated is crucial for protecting retail investors from overvalued listings and market bubbles.

news.title: Why shifting LPG imports beyond Gulf may not quickly ease India supply
news.india_relevance: India's logistical constraints limit its ability to quickly pivot away from Middle Eastern energy sources.
news.why_it_matters: Infrastructure bottlenecks mean that even if alternative sources exist, India remains vulnerable to Gulf-related supply shocks.

news.title: Tech layoffs ease in FY26 in India, but US continues to see large-scale job cuts
news.india_relevance: The health of the IT sector is a primary driver of urban employment and middle-class consumption in India.
news.why_it_matters: A stabilization in Indian tech hiring suggests a decoupling from US trends and a potential recovery in the domestic services economy.

news.title: India's Insurance Commission Problem
news.india_relevance: High commissions in the insurance sector impact the returns and transparency for millions of Indian policyholders.
